title: WLC Interfaces & Network Ports
subtitle: Critical interfaces and communication ports used by Cisco Wireless LAN Controllers.

ports.title: Management Interface
ports.desc: Primary interface used for controller management, AP communication, and WLAN services.

ports.title: CAPWAP Control
ports.desc: Access Points communicate with the controller using CAPWAP control messages.

ports.title: CAPWAP Data
ports.desc: Wireless client traffic is tunneled between APs and the controller.

ports.title: RADIUS Authentication
ports.desc: Used for 802.1X and enterprise wireless authentication.

ports.title: DHCP Services
ports.desc: Provides IP addressing and network parameters to wireless clients.

ports.title: DNS Resolution
ports.desc: Allows AP discovery and hostname resolution within the network.
